reason: Evaluated 4 relevant categories (Health 33, Calendar 18, Weather 33, Text Analysis 17) + 3 specific APIs individually. Remaining ~1400 entries in low-relevance categories (Blockchain, Anime, Games, etc.).
Test files and CI workflows. Patterns already captured from the source scripts.
Meta-API serving the catalog data. Interesting but not applicable to home work.
Both repos exhibit celebrity stagnation. public-apis has infrastructure; codecrafters doesn't. Already merged as cross-repo finding.
